# Sample TS Project

A minimal TypeScript project used as a test fixture for Code Memory Graph.

## Structure

```
src/
  index.ts              — Application entry point
  errors/
    AppError.ts         — Custom error class
  repositories/
    user-repository.ts  — User database operations
  services/
    AuthService.ts      — Authentication logic
    token-service.ts    — JWT token management
  utils/
    password-hasher.ts  — Password hashing utilities
tests/
  auth.test.ts          — Auth service tests
```
